privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic solar PV specification for a residential installation (Smith Residence, 2023-10-15) containing accurate real-world product specifications: Hanwha Q CELLS Q.PEAK DUO BLK G10+ 400W panels, SolarEdge SE7600H-US 7.6kW inverter, and Square D 60A disconnect switch. All equipment is verified as real, commercially available products. The system architecture shows complete power flow from PV generation through utility grid interconnection. However, a metadata inconsistency exists: the required_text includes 'Main Panel' but the specification file contains 'Main Service Panel', not the exact substring 'Main Panel'.
